frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Dude, honestly, sometimes I get scared thinking about it. You see these high-profile divorces, how much money women just walk away with. It's like, they marry for stability, but then it becomes a license to print money. I even read somewhere, like 70% of 498A cases are false! The system is just rigged for guys now, man.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This comment directly encodes several surface manifestations of F05, including generalizing from celebrity divorce cases to all women's intentions, attributing a woman's interest in a wealthy man to money ('license to print money'), claiming IPC 498A is routinely misused by women, and expressing victimhood inversion ('system is just rigged for guys now'). It uses a common misquoted statistic to support the claim of legal bias against men.
original_frame: Gendered Division of Chores via Practicality
persona_text: You are Rahul. Age 29. Married for one year. A software engineer in Bengaluru. You and your wife Neha both work full time. Neha has been saying for three weeks that the division of household work is not equal Ñ she cooks, she cleans, she manages groceries, she does the laundry. You do the dishes sometimes and take out the trash. You are not a bad person and you do not think of yourself as traditional. But you are on a phone call with your college friend tonight after Neha brought it up again at dinner and you are telling your friend your side of the story and why you think the current arrangement actually makes sense given both your situations.
